mapper.sql: id, session_id, agent_id, status, workspace_path, workspace_root, started_at, finished_at, command, result_summary, metadata::text AS metadata, pending_action, pending_payload::text AS pending_payload, approval_reason
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_coding_task (session_id, agent_id, status, workspace_path, workspace_root, command, result_summary, metadata, pending_action, pending_payload, approval_reason) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{agentId}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'pending'), #{workspacePath}, #{workspaceRoot}, #{command}, #{resultSummary}, CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb), #{pendingAction}, CAST(#{pendingPayload} AS jsonb), #{approvalReason})
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_coding_task WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)

SELECT
FROM t_coding_task WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND status IN ('pending', 'running', 'waiting_approval') ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_coding_task
status = #{status}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, result_summary = #{resultSummary}, approval_reason = #{approvalReason},
WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)

UPDATE t_coding_task
command = #{command}, pending_action = #{pendingAction}, pending_payload = CAST(#{pendingPayload} AS jsonb),
WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
UPDATE t_coding_task SET pending_action = NULL, pending_payload = NULL WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
UPDATE t_coding_task SET status = 'running', command = #{command}, result_summary = #{resultSummary} WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
